name: Cleanse Affliction

heightened.text: Attempt to counteract the affliction if it is a disease or poison.
Attempt to counteract the affliction if it is a curse, disease, or poison.

text: Gentle restorative magic pushes back the effects of toxins and more complex maladies. Choose an affliction on the target, such as a curse, disease, or poison. If it has advanced past stage one, reduce the stage by one. This reduction can be applied only once to a given case of an affliction, with the case ending when it's completely cured. Although the reduction can't occur again, heightened versions of this spell attempt to counteract with each casting.
